question: Based on the area chart of output by year, which statement is most appropriate?

options.B: The two highest years touch the top of the chart area, so their relative output levels cannot be determined from the chart alone.
options.C: Output in the last two years is identical.
options.D: Output in the middle year was highest.

explanation: Values exceeding the y-axis range are clipped, making the top bars look the same and misleading viewers.
